title: Congress passed the biggest housing bill in a generation. Trump is holding it hostage.
author: Halina Bennet
text: Evening EditionCongress passed the biggest housing bill in a generation. Trump is holding it hostage.The president said he will not sign it until lawmakers pass his SAVE America Act.Halina BennetJun 25, 2026∙ PaidSenate Majority Leader John Thune watches as President Donald Trump speaks to the media as the two arrive at the U.S. Capitol on Wednesday. Trump is visiting Capitol Hill to push his SAVE America Act.
